name: Nina Krutoyarsky
review: I had a private reiki session with Catherine and it was wonderful! Catherine’s calming presence and genuine interest in understanding my personal goals in order to deliver a customized experience made it feel very comfortable. She was very clear and thorough in explaining everything beforehand. She even followed up afterwards to check in, which demonstrates her desire to see her clients benefit from the reiki healing she provides. The entire experience was peaceful yet powerful and I left feeling great. Thank you, Catherine!

name: Julie Cartegna
review: I’ve been attending yoga classes with Cat for over a year and cannot recommend her enough. Every class is intentional and motivating. Cat always gives us options for different poses because it’s never a 1 size fits all. Our bodies are all different. I feel very welcome every time I join Cat and others on the mat. We also have a lot of fun and laugh. I’ve taken her Saturday flow class, gentle and restore, and Sunday soul love. I’ve also participated in sound baths. Each experience is magical. Thank you Cat, I appreciate you!

name: JOANN SPICUZZO
review: I wish I was able to give more than 5 stars! I had been looking to incorporate yoga into my wellness routine. I just was not sure exactly where to start. I did some research online and I came across Inner Light Pathways. Catherine was wonderful from the very start! She spent time on the phone with me explaining her classes and what she offers. After that one call I knew she was someone I wanted on this journey with me. Catherine is amazing! Her classes are small and individualized. They are so relaxing and at the same time you know your muscles are working. I also tried one of her sound baths. It was wonderful! I had never done anything like that before so I did not know what to expect. I literally felt stress leave my body. If you are looking for some self love time look no further. Catherine is the person for you!

name: Elyssa Volk
review: What an amazing experience! This was my first sound bath ever, and I walked in not knowing what to expect. Catherine held a space that was beaming with comfort and safety. The frequencies of the bowls and gongs resonated deeply and I left feeling lighter in my soul. Took the opportunity to journal that night as well as per Catherine’s guidance, much needed reflection and peace during a time of so much stress. Catherine and Marcel held a healing space, and I highly recommend! Catherine also holds private dance fit classes that I have attended in the past, and she has a way of making everyone feel comfortable and confident!

name: Kate Klebanova
review: I had a pleasure to experience several Sound healing sessions with Catherine and it was amazing! Catherine conducts beautiful symphony with different sounding instruments and it is always super creative and different. If you are looking to just relax and recharge or if you are on the spiritual path of getting to know your inner self, Catherine gentle yet powerful guidance will support you all the way throughout your journey.

name: Caroline Cohen
review: Catherine is a fantastic yoga instructor who always goes above and beyond to ensure everyone feels welcome and comfortable in her classes. Her easygoing and kind-hearted nature makes it effortless to relax and feel at ease. I recently had the pleasure of experiencing another Reiki sound bath with Catherine. It was nothing short of transformative. From the moment I entered, I felt a sense of calm and tranquility. It really helped me to reduce stress, feel calmer and reset my nervous system. I always leave feeling rejuvenated, lighter, more balanced, and at peace. I highly recommend taking a yoga class or attending a Reiki sound bath with Catherine.

name: Melanie Geldenberg
review: The Sound Bath yoga was a spectacular experience that everyone should do at on point in their life. It was amazing to feel relaxed and do nothing for an hour. After the experience, I was extremely relaxed and felt a lot better throughout the evening and the next day. Catherine is an amazing yoga instructor and, if a person is interested in yoga, they should definitely check her out.

name: Ralph OBrien
review: I’m not very experienced at Yoga but I deal with all kinds of people at my job and I can tell you without hesitation that Catherine is one of the best humans on this planet. She teaches both the experienced and novices with great love and respect. I’ve attended many yoga classes and even a sound bath session and every time I was sad when it was over. I could feel the loving energy even in a group of strangers because the leader sets the tone. Do yourself a favor and attend ANY of Catherine’s classes and you’ll be glad you did!

name: Leave us a review!
review: Have you taken classes with Catherine before? We'd love your help so we can share the oppurtunities with others.
